title: Origins++
description: A collection of more than 100 unique origins
body:
Origins++ is an extensive collection of over 100 unique origins to fully expand the origins experience. Each origin comes with advantages, disadvantages, and powers to alter your playstyle. ### Get Involved - Encountered a bug or have feedback/suggestions? Submit them on the [Origins++ GitHub](https://github.com/QuantumXenon/origins-plus-plus) page. - Interested in translating the mod? Visit the [Origins++ Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/origins-plus-plus) page to contribute. ### Mod Compatability (v2.2+) - Origins++ includes built-in compatibility with select mods. - Additionally, you can use [this datapack template](https://github.com/QuantumXenon/origins-plus-plus-modded-support) to extend compatibility to other mods to further customise your play-through.
The [Origins++ Wiki](https://github.com/QuantumXenon/origins-plus-plus/wiki) includes a comprehensive list of all origins and their powers for you to explore.
All credit for the original origins goes to their [respective creators](https://gist.github.com/QuantumXenon/d7ec9ceee0f8897410cff5088307f028), who retain the rights to their work. Special thanks to these authors for granting permission to include their origins in Origins++.
